title: Tangy Silky Ethiopian Pork Curry
description: A rich and flavorful Ethiopian-inspired curry featuring ground pork, tadka, and a blend of spices, perfect for a special occasion. This low-carb-friendly dish is sure to impress with its tangy and silky texture.
instructions: Heat ghee or oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the ground pork and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until it is no longer pink, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the berbere spice and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the tomato puree, heavy cream, and lemon juice. Stir well to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has thickened and the flavors have melded together, about 15-20 minutes.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve over low-carb friendly sides such as cauliflower rice or zucchini noodles.
